skill.name: research-proposal-generator
skill.description: Generates a comprehensive research proposal design based on input literature, including hypothesis, mechanism verification, and budget. Use when the user wants to design a research project from a paper.
skill.summary: Turns scientific papers into structured research proposals with hypothesis extraction, experimental design, and budget planning.
skill.author: AIPOCH

security_audit.summary: All 79 static analysis findings were evaluated and determined to be false positives. The 61 'Weak cryptographic algorithm' findings were triggered by template variable placeholders ({{var}} syntax) in prompt templates used for biomedical research workflows — these are not cryptographic references. The 15 'Ruby/shell backtick execution' findings were triggered by Markdown inline code formatting backticks in documentation. The 2 'Hardcoded URL' findings reference the legitimate GitHub source repository for attribution. The 2 'Extremely long line' findings came from detailed prompt templates designed for complex experimental design instructions. No prompt injection, data exfiltration, or malicious patterns were detected. This skill is a legitimate research proposal generator.

content.user_title: Generate Research Proposals from Scientific Literature
content.value_statement: Design a complete research proposal from any scientific paper. This skill extracts hypotheses, molecular mechanisms, and clinical insights from literature and assembles them into a structured proposal with experimental design, budget, and timeline.
actual_capabilities: Extract scientific hypotheses and cell phenotypes from research papers
Identify molecular mechanisms, signaling pathways, and regulatory relationships
Generate structured research proposal outlines from bioinformatics screening to mechanism verification
Design detailed experiments with model, groups, methods, and expected results
Create 3-year budgets and yearly research plans in Markdown format
Assemble complete research proposals with overview, research plan, budget, and timeline sections
limitations: Requires the full text of a scientific paper as input; cannot work with abstracts alone
Output is a proposal design template, not a grant-ready submission for funding agencies
Does not perform actual bioinformatics analysis or connect to external databases
Budget estimates are approximate and should be reviewed by domain experts

use_cases.title: Early-Career Researcher Planning First Grant
use_cases.description: Generate a structured research proposal outline from a key paper to use as a foundation for grant applications or fellowship proposals.

use_cases.title: Principal Investigator Exploring New Directions
use_cases.description: Quickly design experimental plans for new research directions by providing reference papers and receiving detailed mechanism verification workflows.

use_cases.title: Research Administrator Evaluating Project Feasibility
use_cases.description: Generate standardized proposal drafts from submitted literature to evaluate research scope, budget requirements, and timeline feasibility.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Hypothesis Extraction
prompt_templates.prompt: Extract the scientific hypothesis and cell phenotype from this paper: [paste paper text]
prompt_templates.scenario: Getting started with a single paper to identify the core research question

prompt_templates.title: Molecular Mechanism Analysis
prompt_templates.prompt: Identify the starting variable molecule and key signaling pathways from this paper. List all molecular mechanisms, regulatory relationships, and their connections to the scientific hypothesis: [paper text]
prompt_templates.scenario: Deep analysis of molecular pathways and regulatory networks in a research paper

prompt_templates.title: Full Proposal Outline Generation
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a complete research proposal outline starting from bioinformatics screening through mechanism verification based on this literature. Include sections for bioinformatics screening, candidate molecule verification, mechanism verification, animal studies, and clinical correlation: [paper text]
prompt_templates.scenario: Creating a comprehensive research plan structure from a single source paper

prompt_templates.title: Detailed Experimental Design
prompt_templates.prompt: Design detailed experiments for each section of the proposal outline. For each experiment include: Model system, experimental groups, sample type, detection method, measurement indices, and expected results. Start with bioinformatics screening and end with clinical correlation analysis. Hypothesis: [hypothesis] Phenotype: [phenotype]
prompt_templates.scenario: Fleshing out a proposal outline with specific, actionable experimental protocols

output_examples.input: A research paper on copper-induced cell death (cuproptosis) in gastric cancer, describing the interaction between AARS1 and METTL16 under copper stress conditions.
output_examples.output: A structured research proposal including: 1. Overview section describing gastric cancer and the role of copper death mechanisms. 2. Research plan with subsections covering bioinformatics screening of key genes, candidate molecule validation in cell lines, mechanism verification through knockdown/overexpression experiments, and animal model studies. 3. Budget breakdown for 3 years in RMB with equipment, materials, and personnel costs. 4. Yearly plan with half-year milestones.

output_examples.input: A paper describing a new signaling pathway involving a transcription factor and its role in neurodegenerative disease progression.
output_examples.output: A research proposal starting from RNA-seq bioinformatics screening of differentially expressed genes, through cell line validation of candidate molecules, mechanism verification including protein interaction assays, animal model construction for behavioral testing, and clinical correlation analysis using patient tissue samples and prognosis data.

best_practices: Provide the complete text of the paper including results and discussion to ensure comprehensive extraction of all molecules and pathways.
Review and refine the generated hypothesis before proceeding to experimental design to ensure accuracy of the scientific foundation.
Use the step-by-step workflow in order: start with hypothesis extraction, then outline generation, then detailed experimental design.
anti_patterns: Skipping the hypothesis extraction step and asking for experiments directly without establishing the scientific context and key molecules.
Using incomplete paper excerpts that may miss critical molecular mechanisms, signaling pathways, or regulatory relationships.
Requesting fabricated results or unsupported conclusions that are not grounded in the provided source literature.

faq.question: What input does this skill need?
faq.answer: The full text of a scientific paper including its introduction, methods, results, and discussion sections.

faq.question: Can this skill search for papers online?
faq.answer: No. You must provide the paper text directly. This skill does not connect to external databases or search engines.

faq.question: What format does the proposal use?
faq.answer: The output is a structured Markdown document with four sections: Overview, Research Plan, Budget, and Yearly Plan.

faq.question: Can I use this for non-biomedical research?
faq.answer: This skill is designed for biomedical research proposals. It focuses on molecular mechanisms, signaling pathways, and disease models.

faq.question: How detailed are the experimental designs?
faq.answer: Each experiment includes model system, experimental groups, sample type, detection method, measurement indices, and expected results.

faq.question: Can I customize the budget currency?
faq.answer: The budget is generated in RMB for a 3-year plan. You can manually convert to your preferred currency after generation.
